name: nano-pdf
tagline: ClawHub (268★): Edit PDFs with natural-language instructions using the nano-pdf CLI.
verdict: Strong core: quality A, security A. The one soft spot is output clarity -- the skill mentions producing an output PDF but never states its filename, location, or whether editing is in-place vs. a new file, leaving the result's whereabouts ambiguous. No version tracking either.

highlights.summary: No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, and no dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
An 'output PDF' is referenced as existing but the skill never states its filename/location or whether the edit is in-place vs a new file.
